title: Retail Loss Prevention Specialists
description: Implement procedures and systems to prevent merchandise loss. Conduct audits and investigations of employee activity. May assist in developing policies, procedures, and systems for safeguarding assets.

tasks.text: Investigate known or suspected internal theft, external theft, or vendor fraud.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement or monitor processes to reduce property or financial losses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Identify and report merchandise or stock shortages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain documentation or reports on security-related incidents or investigations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apprehend shoplifters in accordance with guidelines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Verify proper functioning of physical security systems, such as closed-circuit televisions, alarms, sensor tag systems, or locks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify and report safety concerns to maintain a safe shopping and working environment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct store audits to identify problem areas or procedural deficiencies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor compliance with standard operating procedures for loss prevention, physical security, or risk management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect buildings, equipment, or access points to determine security risks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Perform covert surveillance of areas susceptible to loss, such loading docks, distribution centers, or warehouses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare written reports on investigations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with law enforcement agencies to report or investigate crimes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Testify in civil or criminal court proceedings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend methods to reduce potential financial fraud losses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train establishment personnel in loss prevention activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate with risk management, human resources, or other departments to assist in company programs, investigations, or training.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Respond to critical incidents, such as catastrophic events, violent weather, or civil disorders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend new or improved processes or equipment to reduce risk exposure.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct work of contract security officers or other loss prevention agents.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct employee background investigations and review reports with operational or human resources managers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
